issues.title: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene
issues.description:
## Outcome
Reduce repository noise, restore budget gates without threshold increases, enforce deterministic evidence retention, and harden `verify:render` CLI behavior.

## Scope
- canonical tracked evidence policy,
- deterministic cleanup command (`dry-run` + `apply`),
- tracked/untracked evidence pruning,
- `verify:render --skip-deploy` precedence fix,
- docs/status/plans updates,
- full verification and Done sync.

## Acceptance
- [ ] `npm run audit:bloat` passes without increasing `maxTrackedBytes`.
- [ ] Canonical evidence policy is machine-enforced.
- [ ] `npm run cleanup:spring` and `npm run cleanup:spring:apply` work deterministically.
- [ ] `verify:render` honors `--skip-deploy` and `--deploy` flags over env.
- [ ] `npm test`, `npm run verify`, `npm run secrets:scan` pass after cleanup.

issues.title: SC-1 Canonical evidence manifest + enforcement tests
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Add `data/hygiene/evidence-canonical.json` with exact tracked evidence allowlist.
2. Add policy test asserting tracked `evidence/*` exactly matches allowlist.
3. Keep rules deterministic and repository-local.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Canonical manifest exists and is versioned.
- [ ] Test fails when tracked evidence deviates from allowlist.

issues.title: SC-2 Add cleanup-spring command (dry-run + apply)
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Add `scripts/cleanup-spring.js`.
2. Support flags: `--dry-run`, `--apply`, `--prune-tracked`, `--prune-untracked`.
3. Emit machine-readable JSON summary including counts, bytes, and file lists.
4. Wire npm scripts: `cleanup:spring`, `cleanup:spring:apply`.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Dry-run mode reports candidates without deletion.
- [ ] Apply mode prunes selected candidates.
- [ ] Integration tests cover deterministic script behavior.

issues.title: SC-3 Prune legacy evidence to canonical tracked set
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Run cleanup command in apply mode.
2. Remove tracked evidence not listed in canonical manifest.
3. Remove stale untracked `evidence/*` artifacts.
4. Ensure repository remains below bloat budget without raising thresholds.

## Acceptance
- [ ] `git ls-files evidence` equals canonical allowlist.
- [ ] Untracked stale evidence is removed.
- [ ] `npm run audit:bloat` passes.

issues.title: SC-4 Fix verify-render CLI deploy/skip-deploy precedence
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Add CLI arg parsing for `--skip-deploy` and `--deploy`.
2. Enforce explicit CLI precedence over `RENDER_SKIP_DEPLOY` env value.
3. Add tests for parse behavior and conflict rejection.

## Acceptance
- [ ] `npm run verify:render -- --skip-deploy` does not trigger deploy.
- [ ] `npm run verify:render -- --deploy` forces deploy when key is present.
- [ ] Conflicting flags are rejected clearly.

issues.title: SC-5 Update docs/status/plans for cleanup workflow
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Update README with cleanup commands and canonical evidence contract.
2. Update repository hygiene and runbook docs with operational guidance.
3. Update STATUS/PLANS with completion snapshot and policy references.

## Acceptance
- [ ] Documentation matches executable behavior.
- [ ] STATUS/PLANS remain within policy budgets.

issues.title: SC-6 Final verification + Linear Done sync
issues.description:
Parent epic: Epic: Spring Cleanup — Repo/Harness Hygiene

## Scope
1. Run full cleanup gate set (`npm test`, `npm run verify`, `npm run audit:bloat`, `npm run secrets:scan`).
2. Run `verify:render --skip-deploy` to validate new CLI behavior.
3. Capture evidence updates and sync cleanup issues to Done.

## Acceptance
- [ ] All gates pass.
- [ ] Cleanup issue set is synced to Done.
- [ ] No unresolved cleanup regressions remain.
